economic_notes: Fort Albany Power Corporation (100% owned GBE) provides hydro-electric power distribution. 25% interest in Kimesskanemenow LP (winter road construction/maintenance). 25% interest in Creewest LP (contracting opportunities). Minority interest in Mushkegowuk Development Corporation, Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP, and OFN Asset Management GP Corp. COVID-19 impacted operations with periodic closures and increased pandemic funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - basis for qualification is that comparative budget figures are not presented as required by PSAS. Consolidated entities include Fort Albany First Nation Band, Mundo Peetabeck Education Authority, and Peetabeck Health Services. Fort Albany Power Corporation is a GBE accounted for using modified equity method. Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021, signed May 26, 2022 (over a year delay). Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from the text provided (Schedule 1 referenced but not fully included). Current liabilities not separately stated in available text. ISC funding calculated as flexible + fixed + block + grant = 19,441,399. Total government transfers includes ISC + CMHC + FNHIB + Province of Ontario = 28,594,993. OSR = total revenue 30,718,454 minus government transfers 28,594,993 = 2,123,461 (includes earnings from GBE, winter road LP, Mushkegowuk Council, NAN, rental income, other revenue, net of repayment/deferred adjustments). Prior year other expense included loss due to fire ($105,548) and impairment loss on portfolio investments ($368,484).
